rest_deposit_profile.description: Deposit profiles determine the processing of a deposit.

active.description: Indication if the deposit profile is active. Default is True. Implementations should confirm value is true before creating inventory.

description.example: Deposit Profile for Aeronautics and Astronautics

instructions.example: No special instructions; just follow standard procedures
instructions.description: Deposit profile instructions and guidelines for patrons.

target_format.description: Deposit profile metadata target format (currently Dublin Core only). Implementations should confirm submitted bib confirms to returned value before creating inventory.

collection_assignment.description: A collection to which the bib record will be assigned.

access_rights_assignment_options.description: List of access rights policies from which the patron may assign to the deposited representation.

access_rights_policy_assignment.description: The access rights policy that will be automatically assigned to the deposited representation.

library.description: The library that is responsible for managing the deposit.

approval_method.description: Indication whether deposits submitted with this material flow require manual approval. Possible values are AUTO, MANUAL.

unsuppress_on_approval.description: Indication whether records submitted with this material flow will be automatically unsuppressed on approval. Possible values are TRUE (default), FALSE.
